title: The Duskbloods: Closed Network Test to Take Place on Switch 2 from August 21 to 23
summary: FromSoftware has announced the dates for the closed network test for its Switch 2 exclusive, The Duskbloods.

title: Denshattack! Receives Positive Reviews as One of the Best Games of 2026
summary: The railway racing game has been acclaimed for its originality and gameplay, becoming one of the most outstanding titles of the year.

title: Overwatch Stops Updating Stadium Mode After 15 Months Due to Low Participation
summary: Blizzard has halted development of the MOBA-inspired mode due to a significant drop in players.

title: PlayStation Plus Announces July 2026 Games for Extra and Premium
summary: The subscription service reveals its monthly catalog, which includes two major open-world games and PS2 classics.

title: Reports Reveal Climate of Uncertainty and Fear in Xbox Studios After Layoffs
summary: Multiple reports describe a disposable work culture and a massive loss of institutional knowledge under Microsoft's leadership.

title: Glen Schofield, Co-Creator of Dead Space, Announces Retirement from Video Game Development
summary: The veteran developer is retiring from day-to-day work, leaving a legacy of innovation in the horror and action genre.

title: Christopher Nolan's 'The Odyssey' Dominates Rotten Tomatoes and Its Protagonist Arrives in Fortnite
summary: The film receives 98% positive reviews, while Matt Damon as Odysseus becomes a playable character in Fortnite.

title: Mario Tennis Fever Receives Free Update with Super Mario Galaxy Theme
summary: Patch 1.1.0 adds a new court, racket, and special match mode based on the classic platformer.

title: Valve Discontinues Official Parts for Steam Deck LCD, Battery Replacements to Be Third-Party
summary: The company has begun to stop manufacturing components, leading users to seek third-party batteries.

title: 100% of Video Game Developers in Japan Use Artificial Intelligence, According to Survey
summary: AI is mainly used for user analysis and behavior prediction, although concerns about copyright infringement are growing.

title: Former Rockstar Producer Explains Why GTA 6 Doesn't Come to PC at Launch
summary: According to a former developer, starting with consoles allows establishing constraints that facilitate game development.

title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced Has the Best Launch of the Franchise on Steam Despite Controversies
summary: The remake achieves strong initial sales, although the absence of classic mechanics is criticized and strikes occur at the developer studio.

title: Jurassic World Evolution 2: Complete Edition Launches on Switch 2 on July 30
summary: Frontier Developments releases the definitive version of the dinosaur park simulator on Nintendo's new console.

title: Once Upon a Katamari Arrives on Switch 2 on October 8 with Its DLC Included
summary: The classic object-rolling game launches on the console with the additional content 'Rolling LIVE Highlights'.

title: Resident Evil 1 Remake Reportedly Entered Pre-Production Last Year
summary: According to reports, Capcom has already begun early development of the anticipated remake of the classic survival horror.

title: Battlefield 6 to Revive Classic Commander System and Collaborate with Top Gun
summary: The next title in the franchise will bring back a feature from Battlefield 2 and add content inspired by the Top Gun movie.

title: Monster Hunter Wilds Gets Permanent Price Cut Before 18 Months
summary: Capcom permanently reduces the game's price, possibly to maintain interest after its launch.

title: Far Cry TV Series Adds Steve Buscemi to Its Cast
summary: The American actor joins the television adaptation of Ubisoft's video game saga.

title: Tony Hawk's Pro Skater 1+2 Disappears from Game Pass Without Explanation
summary: The skateboarding game was removed from Xbox Game Pass catalog without prior notice or official communication.

title: Microsoft Deletes User's Baby Photos Instead of Restoring Hacked Account
summary: A user reports that the company deleted their family memories while trying to recover their compromised Microsoft account.
